AHC Model Data File Codebook │ December 2024 │ V 1.0 
146 
SR_CORE_SFTY_2_CD 
LABEL: 
Core HRSN Safety 2: How Often Insulted 
DESCRIPTION: Screening result (SR) core health related social need (HRSN) safety – how often is subject insulted by 
anyone, including family and friends. 
LONG NAME: SR_CORE_SFTY_2_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
AHC data system 
VALUES: 
1 = Never 
2 = Rarely 
3 = Sometimes 
4 = Fairly Often 
5 =
